column1: Remove duplicate records using CTE and ROW_NUMBER
ORDER BY salary DESC                                           -- keep highest salary row first
-- Get average salary for each country
AVG(salary) AS avg_sal   -- calculate average salary
GROUP BY country                -- group data by country
ORDER BY avg_sal DESC;          -- show highest paying countries first
-- Get average salary based on years of experience
GROUP BY years_of_experience    -- group by experience level
ORDER BY avg_sal DESC;          -- highest salary first
-- Get top 10 occupations with highest average salary
GROUP BY occupation             -- group by job role
ORDER BY avg_sal DESC;          -- highest paying jobs first
GROUP BY gender                 -- group by gender
ORDER BY avg_sal DESC;          -- highest avg salary first
-- Analyze salary trend by month and year
-- Get top 10 highest salaries with global ranking
DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS sal_rank  -- rank salaries globally
-- Get top salaries within each country
PARTITION BY country        -- reset rank for each country
ORDER BY salary DESC        -- highest salary first
-- Get top 10% highest salaries using NTILE
NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS bucket  -- divide into 10 groups
-- Rank salaries within same experience level
PARTITION BY years_of_experience   -- group by experience
ORDER BY salary DESC               -- highest salary first
-- Compare average salary by company size and rank them
ORDER BY AVG(salary) DESC          -- rank based on avg salary
-- Compare salaries of employees in same city & occupation (self join)
e2.salary AS sal2    -- salary from second instance
AND e1.occupation = e2.occupation  -- same job role
